data.title: Hicks’s Law
data.description: Simplified user interaction by minimizing the number of choices.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.technical_spec: Large, tappable buttons and interactive elements

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Aesthetic design to enhance perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Consistent brand colors and clean UI design

data.title: Cognitive Load Theory
data.description: Reduces complexity and aids in fast decision-making.
data.technical_spec: Minimalist design, focusing on core functionality

data.title: Zeigarnik Effect
data.description: Leveraged to keep users engaged with incomplete actions.
data.technical_spec: Notifications and task reminders to incentivize activity
